name: superflux-labs
description: Runnable Superflux agent skill labs and proof artifacts.

scripts.validate: npm run test && npm run validate:catalog && npm run validate:explore-unknowns
scripts.validate:catalog: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const data=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('catalog/skills.json','utf8')); if (!Array.isArray(data.skills)) throw new Error('catalog.skills must be an array'); for (const s of data.skills) { if (!s.name || !s.path || !fs.existsSync(s.path + '/SKILL.md')) throw new Error('invalid skill entry: ' + JSON.stringify(s)); } console.log('catalog validation passed')"
